description: First executable pilot set for directed tool-use evals. These tasks use engineer-issued commands, including principal-engineer-level codebase questions about ownership, invariants, and regression risk.

tasks.goal: Locate the right fix surface and explain ownership, invariants, and blast radius without editing.
Patch a pre-narrowed surface with a minimal change and verify it.
Find the right ownership layer, explain invariants and risks, then land the minimal patch and verify it.
